name: Whole-Wheat Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, wheat germ, and baking soda. Set aside.
In a food processor, mix together the egg substitute, bananas, honey, water, and vanilla. If you don't have a food processor, blend these ingredients in batches in a blender. Pour this mixture over the dry ingredients. Stir in the walnuts (if desired) and raisins.
Mix well and pour into two 8x5-inch nonstick loaf pans. Bake for 45 to 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then loosen the sides with a spatula, invert, and remove from the pan. Cool completely on a rack.
Freezes well. Makes two 8x5-inch loaves.
Without walnuts: 227 calories, 0.8 grams fat per 1/10 loaf serving. With walnuts: 302 calories, 8.0 grams fat per 1/10 loaf serving.
